ticket_goal: UX: Implement BYOK for AI (AI Provider API Keys)
ticket_description: Implement a 'BYOK for AI' feature in the Settings page to allow users to provide their own API keys for providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini. This bypasses global rate limits and allows for granular model selection.

TECHNICAL_SPECS.UI_UX: Refactor `SettingsPage` to use MUI Tabs ('General', 'Connections', 'BYOK / AI'). Separate Social Platforms and AI Providers under the BYOK tab. Create a dedicated `AIBYOKWizard` component using Material UI to input Provider, API Key, and Preferred Model.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.Security: Store keys in LocalStorage (client-only) accepting the inherent XSS risk for BYOK. Validate user-provided URLs strictly to prevent SSRF if custom endpoints (like Ollama) are supported.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.Architecture: Add `@ai-sdk/openai` and `@ai-sdk/anthropic` to the project. Refactor `src/lib/core/ai.ts` to support dynamic instantiation of providers without caching them globally, avoiding cross-tenant leaks. Implement a custom hook `useAiByok` to manage LocalStorage keys.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.Execution: Create a new validation route `/api/ai/validate-key` for key health checking before save. Update the AI execution paths (`/api/chat/route.ts` and `getMultiPlatformAIPreviews`) to explicitly accept and use injected BYOK keys from the client.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.Edge_Cases: If a user key fails due to auth or quota limits, throw a clear error demanding key update instead of silently falling back to the system quota. Handle validation drift for keys that become invalid after saving.

success_indicators: No global caching of AI providers

fixes_applied: Refactored ai.ts to accept byokConfigs and dynamically instantiate providers.
Created useAiByok hook for localStorage management.
Updated settings/page.tsx to use a tabbed layout.
Updated AI action routes and caller components to propagate byokConfigs.

review-agent.failure_details: src/components/AIBYOKWizard.tsx violates the 50-line rule (237 lines). MUST extract logic into smaller components or sub-files.

success_indicators: AIBYOKWizard refactored to comply with 50-line rule

fixes_applied: Refactored AIBYOKWizard to meet 50-line rule by extracting AddKeyForm, SavedKeysList, Providers, and useAddKeyForm.

success_indicators: All extracted files are under 50 lines.

fixes_applied: Verified all TS and ESLint errors are resolved.
